channel.title: 2016 on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in 2016 on Have an average day :|

item.title: 2015 in review
item.description: 2014 was one of the worse years I’ve ever had with the kids going missing after Iruma’s breakdown. 2015 has been a wild ride. I’ve been reconnected with the children after not seeing them for months, I was laid off, I started my own business, I’ve leveled my cooking, and much more. By far the biggest change was going from full time sysadmin to full time dad. It’s been amazing and by far the most rewarding experience of my life.
